prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using the Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily price data for DE over the past 5 years (up to 2024-05-23) was used to estimate the daily drift (average log return: 0.0007) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns: 0.0151). Using the provided current price of $619.46 as the starting point, 100,000 simulations were run to project the price 6 days into the future. The point estimate is the median of these simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated distribution.
